title: Set of 2 Cat & Dog Themed Mugs Pink Blue Interior - 11 Ounce 310ml Modern Contemporary - Tea Coffee Cups Latte Cappuccino Hot Chocolate Drinks - Home Kitchen Work Office Mug Set Gift
features: This stoneware mug features a delightful blue dog print adorned with hearts and bones, alongside a pink cat print decorated with flowers, making it a perfect addition to any pet lover's home.
The mug boasts a stylish speckled exterior finish, complemented by a vibrant interior and handle coloring, adding a unique and artistic touch to your kitchenware collection.
Crafted from premium stoneware, this mug offers excellent durability, heat retention, and resistance to chipping, ensuring long-lasting use for your daily coffee or tea routine.
With a total capacity of 310ml (11oz) and dimensions of TD 9cm x BD 7.2cm x H 8.5cm, this mug is designed to fit comfortably in hand while holding just the right amount of your favorite beverage.
Featuring adorable pet-inspired designs in both blue and pink, this mug makes a thoughtful and practical gift for cat and dog lovers, bringing warmth and charm to any kitchen or dining space.
description: Product Description This stoneware mug features a charming blue dog print with hearts and bones, and a pink cat print with floral accents—perfect for any pet lover’s home. Its speckled exterior pairs beautifully with the colorful interior and handle, adding a fun, artistic flair to your kitchenware. Made from high-quality stoneware, it offers durability, heat retention, and chip resistance. With a 310ml (11oz) capacity and comfortable dimensions (TD 9cm, BD 7.2cm, H 8.5cm), it’s ideal for daily drinks.
